conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution company that helps businesses like Nuro Technology Solutions optimize their data management. I came across your company and was impressed with the recent pivot towards licensing autonomy tech. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing infrastructure?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) We're doing fine, thanks for asking. We have a team that handles our data processing needs. What makes you think we need your solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, from what I've researched, companies in the autonomous vehicle space like Nuro deal with massive amounts of sensor data. Our solution can help reduce the processing time and costs associated with handling that data. We've seen significant ROI for our clients in similar industries.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's something we're looking to change right now. We've invested heavily in our current infrastructure and I'm not convinced that your solution would be worth the cost. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing varies depending on the scope of the project, but we typically see companies save around 30% on their data processing costs. We also offer a free trial to test our solution and see the benefits firsthand.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds expensive. We're on a tight budget after the recent funding round, and I'm not sure we can justify the cost. Plus, we're already in talks with some of your competitors, so I'd need to compare your offering to theirs.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget is a concern, but our solution has been shown to pay for itself in the long run. As for competitors, we've worked with several companies in the autonomous vehicle space and have a proven track record of success. I'd be happy to provide some case studies and references.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Look, I appreciate the pitch, but I really need to discuss this with our team and see if it's something we're interested in pursuing. We have a lot on our plate right now and I don't think we can prioritize this at the moment. I'm going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand, and I appreciate your honesty. If you're willing, I'd like to follow up in a few months to see if your priorities have changed.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: No, I don't think that will be necessary. We have a clear direction for our data processing needs, and it doesn't involve DeepData AI. Thank you for your time, but we're not interested in moving forward.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and provide more tailored value propositions to counter the perceived expense of the solution. Sentiment: Negative
